title: Dell security advisory (AV26-638)
description: Between June 22 and 28, 2026, Dell published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products:
products: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager Appliance DM5510  versions prior to 20.1.0.0
Dell Networking OS10  versions prior to 10.6.1.2
Dell Private Cloud, Nutanix  versions prior to 01.02.00.00
Dell AX System for Azure  versions prior to 2606
Dell OpenManage Enterprise Modular  versions prior to 2.20.20
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
